column1: # Cyclops dual-OTA layout for the XIAO ESP32S3 (8MB flash).
# Two 3MB app slots so OTA can write the inactive slot and flip the boot pointer.
# nvs is kept at the SAME offset/size as huge_app.csv so WiFi creds
# and all saved audio/camera settings SURVIVE the one-time USB re-flash to this table.
# SPIFFS is dropped (unused: <FS.h> is only pulled in for the SD File type).
